videos.headline: Carson Beck slings 50-yard TD to pad Georgia's lead
videos.description: Carson Beck secures his fourth passing touchdown of the game with a 50-yard dot to Arian Smith.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck slings 50-yard TD to pad Georgia's lead) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck slings 5 TDs in Georgia win
videos.description: Carson Beck shines with five touchdown and 242 passing yards in Georgia's dominant win over Tennessee Tech.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Carson Beck slings 5 TDs in Georgia win) 2024/09/07 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Carson Beck, Georgia start hot with opening-drive TD
videos.description: Carson Beck drops in a 22-yard pass to Dillon Bell for a Georgia touchdown on the first offensive play of the drive against Tennessee Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck, Georgia start hot with opening-drive TD) 2024/9/7

videos.headline: Carson Beck tosses 2nd TD with 6-yard dart for Georgia
videos.description: Carson Beck keeps calm in the pocket and funnels a six-yard touchdown pass to Colbie Young to pad Georgia's lead against Tennessee Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck tosses 2nd TD with 6-yard dart for Georgia) 2024/9/7

videos.headline: Georgia's Carson Beck throws dart to Dominic Lovett for 3rd TD pass
videos.description: Georgia's Carson Beck picks up his third touchdown pass of the first half with a dime to Dominic Lovett against Tennessee Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's Carson Beck throws dart to Dominic Lovett for 3rd TD pass) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck's 5th TD pass puts Georgia up 38-0
videos.description: Carson Beck finds Lawson Luckie down the sideline for another Georgia touchdown against Tennessee Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck's 5th TD pass puts Georgia up 38-0) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Branson Robinson rushes in for 13-yard touchdown
videos.description: Branson Robinson rushes in for 13-yard touchdown
